text: The @BoringCompany could build a Hyperloop tunnel from downtown SF to downtown LA for <5% of this cost and it would be a technological marvel exceeding any high speed rail on Earth https://t.co/2WwQuDVIAV
summary: The @BoringCompany could build a Hyperloop tunnel from downtown SF to downtown LA for <5% of this cost and it would be a technological marvel exceeding any high speed rail on Earth
ai_summary: Elon Musk claims The Boring Company could construct a Hyperloop tunnel between San Francisco and Los Angeles for less than 5% of California's high-speed rail project cost, positioning it as a superior technological alternative. This highlights a core business strategy of leveraging tunnel-boring and underground infrastructure technology to solve transportation challenges more efficiently and cost-effectively than traditional rail projects, demonstrating how The Boring Company differentiates itself through radical cost reduction and technical innovation.
embed_html:
The @BoringCompany could build a Hyperloop tunnel from downtown SF to downtown LA for <5% of this cost and it would be a technological marvel exceeding any high speed rail on Earth https://t.co/2WwQuDVIAV

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) April 9, 2026

text: Grok is the AI to use if you value truth https://t.co/OReyy0zhWG
summary: Grok is the AI to use if you value truth
ai_summary: Elon Musk promotes Grok, xAI's AI assistant, positioning it as a truth-focused alternative in the competitive AI market. This reflects xAI's product differentiation strategy and Musk's broader effort to establish Grok as a viable competitor to ChatGPT and other large language models, highlighting the business imperative of trustworthiness as a competitive advantage in AI products.

summary: Use 𝕏 Chat for messaging and voice/video calls. Comes with this great benefit of actual privacy.

text: We need to focus on finishing Colossus 2 and ensuring it is extremely stable, then will build the water recycling plant https://t.co/CHFUu50SGX
summary: We need to focus on finishing Colossus 2 and ensuring it is extremely stable, then will build the water recycling plant
ai_summary: Elon discusses infrastructure priorities for what appears to be xAI's Colossus supercomputer facility, emphasizing the staged approach of first stabilizing Colossus 2 before expanding to support systems like water recycling. The insight demonstrates disciplined execution strategy: achieving stability in core infrastructure before scaling ancillary systems—a critical lesson for operators managing compute-intensive or capital-heavy operations.

text:
Tesla V14.3 self-driving review. The point releases will bring polish.

V15 will far exceed human levels of safety, even in completely unsupervised and complex situations. https://t.co/s4UK9RWw9f
summary: Tesla V14.3 self-driving review. The point releases will bring polish. V15 will far exceed human levels of safety, even in completely unsupervised and complex situations.
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces Tesla's Full Self-Driving software roadmap, noting that V14.3 point releases will incrementally improve the feature's polish and reliability. He projects that V15 will achieve safety levels exceeding human drivers in unsupervised, complex driving situations—a significant product milestone that addresses Tesla's autonomous driving commercialization strategy and competitive positioning in the autonomous vehicle market.
